title: Programming & Fundamentals
description: Learn the foundational tools: Python programming, environments, and version control.

title: Mathematics for Data Science
description: The math behind the algorithms: Linear Algebra and Calculus.

title: Statistics & Probability
description: Descriptive and inferential statistics, distributions, and hypothesis testing.

title: Data Manipulation & Analysis
description: Cleaning and shaping data using powerful Python libraries.

title: Data Visualization (EDA)
description: Exploratory Data Analysis and visual storytelling.

title: SQL & Databases
description: Storing, querying, and managing relational and non-relational data.

title: Machine Learning (Intermediate)
description: Building predictive models using Scikit-Learn. Supervised and unsupervised algorithms.

title: Advanced Machine Learning
description: Tree ensembles, gradient boosting, and advanced feature engineering.

title: Deep Learning (Advanced)
description: Artificial Neural Networks using PyTorch or TensorFlow.

title: Natural Language Processing (NLP)
description: Text processing, embeddings, and Large Language Models (LLMs).

title: Computer Vision
description: Image processing and Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs).

title: Big Data & MLOps (Expert)
description: Scaling to big data and deploying models into production environments.
